prompts.title: Studio Headshot
prompts.prompt: Ultra realistic studio portrait of a young woman with curly dark hair, neutral expression, standing in front of a soft grey backdrop, beauty lighting with softboxes, crisp skin detail, subtle makeup, 85 mm lens, shallow depth of field, 4K resolution, no body distortions, no extra limbs.

prompts.title: Cinematic Close-up
prompts.prompt: Close-up portrait of an elderly fisherman standing by the sea during a windy afternoon, water droplets on his jacket, dramatic shadows across his face, strong side light inspired by Rembrandt, Arri Alexa cinematic look, 50 mm lens, textured skin, 4K, no blur, no duplicated objects.

prompts.title: Character Consistency
prompts.prompt: Portrait of a 35-year-old man with short black hair, trimmed beard, small scar above his right eyebrow, angular jawline, wearing a navy hoodie, soft window light from the left, realistic photography style, 50 mm lens, same character as previous image, no changes to face structure.

prompts.title: Minimal Product Shot
prompts.prompt: Elegant perfume bottle placed on a stone podium, floating droplets around, pastel gradient background, studio softbox lighting, clean reflections, accurate typography on the label, high detail textures, 8K resolution, no distortions, no warped labels.

prompts.title: Flat Lay E-commerce
prompts.prompt: Top-down flat lay of skincare products arranged on a beige linen surface, soft morning light, subtle shadows, minimalist composition with negative space for text, 4K resolution, sharp edges, no overlapping objects, no logo warping.

prompts.title: Amazon-style Packshot
prompts.prompt: Single product photo of a boxed coffee machine on pure white background (#FFFFFF), soft even lighting, no shadows on the edges, ultra sharp text and logos, realistic reflections, optimized for e-commerce listing, 300 DPI.

prompts.title: Beach Product Scene
prompts.prompt: Show this gold necklace on a sandy beach with gentle morning light and soft shadows, seashells scattered nearby.

prompts.title: Boho Living Room Background
prompts.prompt: Add a soft boho-style living-room background behind this linen tote bag, with warm sunlight, rattan textures, and neutral beige tones.

prompts.title: 3D Podium
prompts.prompt: Place this running shoe on a premium 3D podium with soft studio lighting and a subtle shadow beneath it.

prompts.title: Underwater Product
prompts.prompt: Show this shower gel bottle submerged in clear turquoise ocean water, with caustic light reflections shimmering on the surface.

prompts.title: Luxury Cosmetics Ad
prompts.prompt: Transform this perfume bottle into a luxury cosmetics-style ad with glossy highlights and a reflective black background.

prompts.title: Marble Countertop
prompts.prompt: Place this skincare cream jar on a marble countertop with natural window light and soft depth of field.

prompts.title: Futuristic CGI Environment
prompts.prompt: Place this smartwatch inside a futuristic CGI environment with neon accents, chrome reflections, and glowing floor lights.

prompts.title: Coffee Beach Scene
prompts.prompt: Show this coffee mug on a sandy beach with a small palm leaf shadow and soft golden-hour lighting.

prompts.title: Dramatic Spotlight
prompts.prompt: Add a dramatic spotlight behind this leather wallet with a smoky gradient atmosphere for a premium hero-shot look.

prompts.title: Floating Hero Shot
prompts.prompt: Turn this lipstick into a floating hero-shot with suspended particles and a minimal monochrome backdrop.

prompts.title: Kitchen Flatlay
prompts.prompt: Place this chef's knife in a top-down flatlay with matching kitchen props, wooden textures, and balanced color harmony.

prompts.title: Jewelry Display
prompts.prompt: Put this bracelet on a velvety jewelry display with soft side lighting and macro-level detail clarity.

prompts.title: Street Fashion Background
prompts.prompt: Show this handbag on a street-style fashion background with blurred pedestrians and warm sunlight.

prompts.title: Laboratory Glassware
prompts.prompt: Place this bottle of serum beside glowing laboratory glassware for a science-backed skincare ad look.

prompts.title: Modern Living Room
prompts.prompt: Wide shot of a modern living room with a large beige sofa, wooden coffee table, floor-to-ceiling windows showing a city skyline at sunset, warm ambient lighting, soft indirect lamps, clean Scandinavian style, 4K render, straight vertical lines, no distortion.

prompts.title: Cozy Bedroom
prompts.prompt: Minimal bedroom with a low platform bed, white linen sheets, textured beige wall, small reading lamp on the side, early morning natural light entering from the left window, soft shadows, calm and cozy atmosphere, lifestyle photography look, no clutter, 16:9 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Japanese Ramen Restaurant
prompts.prompt: Interior view of a small Japanese ramen restaurant, wooden counter, hanging lanterns, steam rising from bowls, customers sitting on stools, cinematic warm light, shallow depth of field focused on the ramen bowl in the foreground, realistic textures, 4K, no motion blur.

prompts.title: Packaging Mockup
prompts.prompt: Clean packaging mockup of a chocolate bar wrapper lying on a solid pastel background, front view, accurate sharp typography, brand logo centered, realistic print finish, soft studio lighting, 4K image, no warped edges, no repeating artifacts.

prompts.title: Billboard Concept
prompts.prompt: Outdoor billboard mockup on a city street at night, glowing display, minimal ad for a tech startup, bold typography, moody blue and purple lighting, reflections on wet pavement, cinematic atmosphere.

prompts.title: Logo on Merch
prompts.prompt: Close-up of a black cotton t-shirt hanging on a wooden hanger, embroidered white logo on the chest, diffused daylight, fabric texture clearly visible, 4K image, realistic folds, no extra seams, accurate logo placement, clean background.

prompts.title: Full Brand Kit
prompts.prompt: Create a complete brand identity kit for a modern tech startup named 'NovaEdge Systems,' including logo variations, color palette, typography system, icon set, pattern language, and layout rules. The style should be clean, futuristic, minimal, and consistent across all assets.

prompts.title: Business Card Mockup
prompts.prompt: Generate realistic brand mockups for this 'AstraLoop Studio' logo applied to a business card, letterhead, notepad, envelope, and ID badge. Use premium materials, soft shadows, and a clean studio aesthetic to convey a polished corporate identity.

prompts.title: Visual Identity System
prompts.prompt: Develop a full visual brand identity system for 'FluxBeam Labs,' including logo clear-space rules, do/don't usage, brand patterns, grid system, color variations, and sample branded layouts for web + print. Style direction: geometric, energetic, and tech-forward.

prompts.title: Brand Mockup Collection
prompts.prompt: Create high-resolution mockups showing the 'Skyline Robotics' brand logo and tagline applied to neon signage, packaging boxes, stickers, a hoodie, a coffee mug, and a laptop decal. Visual tone: youthful, modern, bold, and startup-friendly.

prompts.title: Anime Character
prompts.prompt: Full-body anime illustration of a young female hacker in a neon-lit city, blue and pink cyberpunk glow, dynamic pose, detailed futuristic outfit, crisp line art, high contrast lighting, 4K image, consistent character across multiple frames.

prompts.title: Watercolor Landscape
prompts.prompt: Soft watercolor painting of a mountain lake at sunrise, mist above the water, pine trees in the distance, pastel color palette, visible brush strokes, textured paper background, no harsh lines.

prompts.title: Concept Art
prompts.prompt: Cinematic concept art of a futuristic desert city built around a giant tree, warm golden hour lighting, long shadows, small silhouettes of people walking, wide 21:9 aspect ratio, detailed architecture, depth and atmosphere, no random glitches.

prompts.title: Instagram Product Post
prompts.prompt: Square Instagram shot of a specialty coffee cup on a wooden table, latte art heart, soft morning light from the right, blurred cafe background, warm and cozy mood, photorealistic style, ready for overlay text, clean composition.

prompts.title: Carousel Visual
prompts.prompt: Set of three matching visuals for a social media carousel about productivity, minimal flat lay of desk items on pastel backgrounds, consistent color palette, top-down view, no text in the image, 4K resolution, cohesive series look.

prompts.title: LinkedIn Banner
prompts.prompt: Wide banner image with abstract geometric shapes in blue and purple gradients, subtle tech texture, clean space on the left for title, corporate but modern look, 3:1 aspect ratio, brand visual, no text, no logo.

prompts.title: AI Evolution Timeline
prompts.prompt: Create a clean, modern vertical timeline infographic illustrating the major milestones of AI evolution from 2010 to 2025. Use a white background, thin grey dividers, and circular markers for each year. Include minimal icons, short text blocks, and smooth gradient accents in blue. Ensure the layout is symmetrical, evenly spaced, and visually balanced, with a bold header at the top reading 'Evolution of AI: 2010–2025.'

prompts.title: Marketing Insights Overview
prompts.prompt: Generate a summary-style infographic titled '2025 Marketing Insights Overview.' Use four large rectangular sections, each with an icon, a bold title, and 2–3 bullet points. Maintain a pastel color palette (muted blues, greens, corals). Keep typography clean and modern, using bold headers and light-body text. Add subtle dotted patterns and clean left-aligned layouts for readability.

prompts.title: B2B Content Marketing Steps
prompts.prompt: Design a structured infographic showing '5 Steps of B2B Content Marketing Analysis.' Arrange the steps in a horizontal zig-zag or ladder-style format. Each step includes: a large number label, a strong icon, and a two-line description. Maintain a corporate aesthetic: navy, cobalt, and white palette with geometric shapes. Add a footer bar with 'Source: ImagineArt Research.'

prompts.title: Consumer Survey Results
prompts.prompt: Create a visually engaging infographic showcasing survey results titled 'What Consumers Expect from AI Tools in 2025.' Include: A large header section, Three bar charts, Two pictogram-style percentage visuals, Small illustrations of users interacting with AI devices. Use bright colors, rounded shapes, and friendly minimal icons. Keep overall layout organized and data-heavy but clean.

prompts.title: Lung Health Tips
prompts.prompt: Design a medical-themed infographic titled '5 Essential Tips for Lung Health.' Use hospital-style minimal visuals: clean white background, soft blue accents, thin teal icons, and a human lung illustration at the top. Include sections like: 'Avoid Smoking,' 'Exercise Regularly,' 'Improve Indoor Air,' 'Stay Hydrated,' and 'Get Regular Checkups.' Use soft shadows and high readability.

prompts.title: Carbon Footprint Reduction
prompts.prompt: Create a sustainability infographic titled '10 Ways to Reduce Your Carbon Footprint.' Use earthy greens, warm beige, and natural leaf illustrations. Display information in numbered circles arranged in a grid. Include small eco-icons (leaf, water droplet, recycling, solar panel). Add a footer section showing a simple 'impact score' chart. Use textured, organic shapes to reinforce the eco theme.

prompts.title: 3D Metallic Text
prompts.prompt: Render the word 'IMAGINE' in 3D block letters with metallic gold texture, soft shadow, and high-resolution, centered on a clean white background.

prompts.title: Neon Futuristic Text
prompts.prompt: Display the phrase 'AI CREATIVE POWER' using a futuristic sans-serif font, neon cyan glow, subtle reflections on a dark gradient background, emphasizing clarity and letter spacing.

prompts.title: Calligraphy Quote
prompts.prompt: Create a motivational quote: 'Creativity is intelligence having fun.' Use hand-lettered calligraphy with flowing curves, ink texture, and watercolor background with soft gradients.

prompts.title: Logo with Symbol
prompts.prompt: Design the text 'Higgsfield AI' integrated with a looping S-curve symbol, glowing neon green accents, shadowed high contrast, suitable for digital and print display.

prompts.title: Data Chart Labels
prompts.prompt: Render a data chart with headings, labels, and percentages ('Revenue 2025: 42%', 'Growth: 18%', 'User Engagement: 76%'), each label styled consistently in legible modern sans-serif, with realistic depth, shadows, and clean visual hierarchy.

prompts.title: Tech Blog Homepage
prompts.prompt: Design a clean, modern homepage for a tech-focused blog website. Use a minimalist layout with a full-width hero section at the top, including the brand logo in the top-left, a navigation bar with 'Home, Categories, About, Contact,' and a central headline with a subheadline. Use sans-serif typography (Inter / Satoshi). Include three featured article cards with thumbnails, titles, category tags, and short summaries. Add a prominent CTA button labeled 'Read Latest Insights' below the hero text. Footer should contain social icons, newsletter signup field, and minimal copyright text. Maintain generous white space and soft shadows for a premium editorial feel.

prompts.title: Product Release Page
prompts.prompt: Create a modern, high-conversion webpage introducing new product releases. Place the company logo in the top-left and a thin navigation bar across the top. Use a bold headline such as 'Introducing Our Newest Innovations,' centered over a clean hero banner with one featured product in the spotlight. Below, create a 3–4 column grid of product cards with crisp images, product names, short feature bullets, and a 'View Details' CTA on each card. Use a geometric sans-serif font for headlines and a clean grotesk for descriptions. Maintain consistent spacing, soft gradients, and subtle drop shadows. Add a sticky CTA bar at the bottom with 'See All Products.' Footer should include links, FAQ, and contact information.

prompts.title: Jewelry E-commerce Page
prompts.prompt: Design an elegant e-commerce product page for a high-end jewelry brand. Use a serif font for headings (Playfair / Cormorant Garamond) and a refined sans-serif for body text. Place the brand logo centered at the top with a thin black navigation bar beneath it. Include a large hero section showcasing a single premium jewelry piece on a soft neutral background, with a vertical layout: product image on the left, product name + price + 'Add to Cart' button on the right. Add thumbnails of alternative angles below the main image. Include sections for product details, materials, authenticity, and customer reviews. Use gold or champagne accents for CTA buttons. Footer should contain store policies, customer care, and newsletter signup. Maintain a clean, luxury aesthetic with high spacing and delicate typography.

prompts.title: Car Service Landing Page
prompts.prompt: Create a bold, high-trust landing page for a car service and repair shop. Use strong, clean typography (Montserrat / Bold geometric sans). The header should include the logo on the left and a bold CTA button 'Book Service' on the right. Hero banner: a full-width image of a car in a workshop, with a headline like 'Reliable Car Service You Can Trust' and a subheadline beneath it. Include a phone number and quick-booking button directly under the headline. Below the hero, add three service feature blocks (Diagnostics, Engine Repair, Tire Replacement) with icons and short descriptions. Add a pricing table section with three tiers. Use dark greys, steel blues, and yellow accents to match automotive themes. Footer should include opening hours, location map, contact details, and certification badges.

prompts.title: Background Replacement
prompts.prompt: Replace the background of this subject with a realistic urban sunset skyline, maintaining proper shadows and ambient light interaction with the subject.

prompts.title: Cinematic Color Grading
prompts.prompt: Apply a moody, cinematic teal-and-orange color grade to this outdoor scene, increasing contrast, enhancing sunlight highlights, and deepening shadows.

prompts.title: Object Removal
prompts.prompt: Remove all background distractions from this photo, including wires, litter, and signs, while seamlessly blending the surrounding environment.

prompts.title: Rembrandt Style Transfer
prompts.prompt: Transform this photo into a hyper-realistic painting style reminiscent of Rembrandt, preserving facial features and textures but adding dramatic lighting and brushstroke textures.

prompts.title: Portrait Retouching
prompts.prompt: Enhance this portrait by smoothing skin, brightening eyes, whitening teeth, and adding soft cinematic lighting, while keeping natural textures and avoiding plastic-like effects.

prompts.title: Character Standoff
prompts.prompt: Create a manga of these characters and show the stand off between Messi and Ronaldo.

prompts.title: Meme Mashup
prompts.prompt: A high-impact, comic-style mega-mashup of iconic meme figures collaboratively driving an action-packed, retro-vibe crossover scene.

prompts.title: Intense Portrait with X Mark
prompts.prompt: A dynamic and intense close-up portrait in a graphic novel or comic book art style, featuring a male character with long, dark, slightly messy hair and a short beard, wearing a suit and tie. His eyes are glowing with furious, stylized yellow energy or smoke, extending outwards. His expression is one of extreme anger, determination, and pain, with gritted teeth and visible facial scars or distress. Dominating the image is a bold, bright red 'X' drawn over his face, extending from corner to corner of the frame, symbolizing danger, a target, or a 'no entry' warning. The artwork is characterized by strong, confident black ink lines, high contrast, and a gritty, textured, almost sketched quality. The color palette is stark: black, white, red, and vibrant yellow for the eyes, on a clean white or light grey background.
